findings.detail: DEFINITIVE: shadow_votes is NOT passed to generate_decision(). The call at line 239-245 passes: l1, l2, l3, red_team, resonance, hypotheses, fragility_report, cross_border_report. No shadow_votes keyword. The previous integration audit (2026-05-18T08:22:38Z) documented shadow_votes=None — this is now fully removed, not just None. Decision module signature matches: no shadow_votes parameter.

Zero module-level imports of pipeline stages. All stage imports are lazy (inside run_post_gate1()): layer1_narrative, layer2_fundamental, layer3_technical, red_team, resonance, decision, regime_mapper, scenario_forecaster, fragility_scanner, cross_border_analyzer, asset_universe. Zero imports from shadows/. Zero back-imports from glue layer.

Receives state dict from run_pre_gate1(), extracts 9 keys on lines 29-37: tracker, archivist, session_date, shadow_db, mother, news_items, triage_results, hypotheses, actionable. Each used in corresponding stages. Clean consumption — no unused keys. pre_gate1 guarantees all keys exist even on error paths.

Stages 4-10 in correct order: L1 (4) → L2+L3 parallel via asyncio.gather (5) → Shadows (6) → Red Team (7) → Resonance (8) → Decision (9) → Archive (10). Phase H modules interleaved: regime_mapper after L1, scenario_forecaster/fragility_scanner/cross_border_analyzer before Decision. No circular dependencies.

Sequential pipeline with no while loops or recursion. asyncio.gather runs L2+L3 with fixed fanout (2 tasks). Shadow stage gated behind enabled+not-None check. No infinite loop or unbounded concurrency risk.
Archive subdirectories: analysis/ (L1, L2, L3), review/ (Red Team, Resonance), decisions/ (Decision). Each try/except wrapped — pipeline never fails on IO errors. FTS5 index at Stage 10.

notes: DEFINITIVE INTEGRATION AUDIT: shadow_votes fully removed from post_gate1. generate_decision() called without shadow_votes — matches updated decision.py signature. All 9 state dict keys consumed. L2+L3 parallel via asyncio.gather. Phase H modules integrated with error recovery. Clean single-direction data flow from pre_gate1 through stages 4-10 to archive.
